case_title: RODRIGUEZ, MARLON R. VS FREDDY DBA READY FREDDY AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO FREDDY RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARLON R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREDDY DBA READY FREDDY AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, MARLON R. AS TO DEFENDANT FREDDY DBA READY FREDDY AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1996 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FREDDY DBA READY FREDDY AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP HEARING SET FOR JAN-27-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-27-1997, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-09-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-03-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, MARLON R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FREDDY DBA READY FREDDY AUTO REPAIR & BODY SHOP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
